mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode && strlen(opts_out->quote) != 1)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY quote must be a single one-byte character\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->delim[0] == opts_out->quote[0])\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY delimiter and quote must be different\")));\n\n\t/* Check escape */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->escape != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY escape available only in CSV mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode && strlen(opts_out->escape) != 1)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY escape must be a single one-byte character\")));\n\n\t/* Check force_quote */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && (opts_out->force_quote || opts_out->force_quote_all))\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force quote available only in CSV mode\")));\n\tif ((opts_out->force_quote || opts_out->force_quote_all) && is_from)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force quote only available using COPY TO\")));\n\n\t/* Check force_notnull */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->force_notnull != NIL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force not null available only in CSV mode\")));\n\tif (opts_out->force_notnull != NIL && !is_from)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force not null only available using COPY FROM\")));\n\n\t/* Check force_null */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->force_null != NIL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force null available only in CSV mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->force_null != NIL && !is_from)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force null only available using COPY FROM\")));\n\n\t/* Don't allow the delimiter to appear in the null string. */\n\tif (strchr(opts_out->null_print, opts_out->delim[0]) != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY delimiter must not appear in the NULL specification\")));\n\n\t/* Don't allow the CSV quote char to appear in the null string. */\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode &&\n\t\tstrchr(opts_out->null_print, opts_out->quote[0]) != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CSV quote character must not appear in the NULL specification\")));\n}\n\n/*\n * CopyGetAttnums - build an integer list of attnums to be copied\n *\n * The input attnamelist is either the user-specified column list,\n * or NIL if there was none (in which case we want all the non-dropped\n * columns).\n *\n * We don't include generated columns in the generated full list and we don't\n * allow them to be specified explicitly.  They don't make sense for COPY\n * FROM, but we could possibly allow them for COPY TO.  But this way it's at\n * least ensured that whatever we copy out can be copied back in.\n *\n * rel can be NULL ... it's only used for error reports.\n */\nList *\nCopyGetAttnums(TupleDesc tupDesc, Relation rel, List *attnamelist)\n{\n\tList\t   *attnums = NIL;\n\n\tif (attnamelist == NIL)\n\t{\n\t\t/* Generate default column list */\n\t\tint\t\t\tattr_count = tupDesc->natts;\n\t\tint\t\t\ti;\n\n\t\tfor (i = 0; i < attr_count; i++)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (TupleDescAttr(tupDesc, i)->attisdropped)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\tif (TupleDescAttr(tupDesc, i)->attgenerated)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\tattnums = lappend_int(attnums, i + 1);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\telse\n\t{\n\t\t/* Validate the user-supplied list and extract attnums */\n\t\tListCell   *l;\n\n\t\tforeach(l, attnamelist)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tchar\t   *name = strVal(lfirst(l));\n\t\t\tint\t\t\tattnum;\n\t\t\tint\t\t\ti;\n\n\t\t\t/* Lookup column name */\n\t\t\tattnum = InvalidAttrNumber;\n\t\t\tfor (i = 0; i < tupDesc->natts; i++)\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tForm_pg_attribute att = TupleDescAttr(tupDesc, i);\n\n\t\t\t\tif (att->attisdropped)\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\t\tif (namestrcmp(&(att->attname), name) == 0)\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif (att->attgenerated)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_COLUMN_REFERENCE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"column \\\"%s\\\" is a generated column\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errdetail(\"Generated columns cannot be used in COPY.\")));\n\t\t\t\t\tattnum = att->attnum;\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif (attnum == InvalidAttrNumber)\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tif (rel != NULL)\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_UNDEFINED_COLUMN),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"column \\\"%s\\\" of relation \\\"%s\\\" does not exist\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname, RelationGetRelationName(rel))));\n\t\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_UNDEFINED_COLUMN),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"column \\\"%s\\\" does not exist\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname)));\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t/* Check for duplicates */\n\t\t\tif (list_member_int(attnums, attnum))\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_DUPLICATE_COLUMN),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"column \\\"%s\\\" specified more than once\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname)));\n\t\t\tattnums = lappend_int(attnums, attnum);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn attnums;\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":10925,"cache_read_input_tokens":126258,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":10925,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"88ebb3dd-d405-4468-a754-ec8457012ca6","uuid":"eb778c8a-d3b9-43bb-a303-9aed2844ea49"}

In the \"TO\" case\n * we also support copying the output of an arbitrary SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE\n * or DELETE query.\n *\n * If <pipe> is false, transfer is between the table and the file named\n * <filename>.  Otherwise, transfer is between the table and our regular\n * input/output stream. The latter could be either stdin/stdout or a\n * socket, depending on whether we're running under Postmaster control.\n *\n * Do not allow a Postgres user without the 'pg_read_server_files' or\n * 'pg_write_server_files' role to read from or write to a file.\n *\n * Do not allow the copy if user doesn't have proper permission to access\n * the table or the specifically requested columns.\n */\nvoid\nDoCopy(ParseState *pstate, const CopyStmt *stmt,\n\t   int stmt_location, int stmt_len,\n\t   uint64 *processed)\n{\n\tbool\t\tis_from = stmt->is_from;\n\tbool\t\tpipe = (stmt->filename == NULL);\n\tRelation\trel;\n\tOid\t\t\trelid;\n\tRawStmt    *query = NULL;\n\tNode\t   *whereClause = NULL;\n\n\t/*\n\t * Disallow COPY to/from file or program except to users with the\n\t * appropriate role.\n\t */\n\tif (!pipe)\n\t{\n\t\tif (stmt->is_program)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (!is_member_of_role(GetUserId(), ROLE_PG_EXECUTE_SERVER_PROGRAM))\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"must be superuser or a member of the pg_execute_server_program role to COPY to or from an external program\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errhint(\"Anyone can COPY to stdout or from stdin. \"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t \"psql's \\\\copy command also works for anyone.\")));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (is_from && !is_member_of_role(GetUserId(), ROLE_PG_READ_SERVER_FILES))\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"must be superuser or a member of the pg_read_server_files role to COPY from a file\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errhint(\"Anyone can COPY to stdout or from stdin. \"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t \"psql's \\\\copy command also works for anyone.\")));\n\n\t\t\tif (!is_from && !is_member_of_role(GetUserId(), ROLE_PG_WRITE_SERVER_FILES))\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"must be superuser or a member of the pg_write_server_files role to COPY to a file\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errhint(\"Anyone can COPY to stdout or from stdin. \"\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t \"psql's \\\\copy command also works for anyone.\")));\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif (stmt->relation)\n\t{\n\t\tLOCKMODE\tlockmode = is_from ? RowExclusiveLock : AccessShareLock;\n\t\tParseNamespaceItem *nsitem;\n\t\tRangeTblEntry *rte;\n\t\tTupleDesc\ttupDesc;\n\t\tList\t   *attnums;\n\t\tListCell   *cur;\n\n\t\tAssert(!stmt->query);\n\n\t\t/* Open and lock the relation, using the appropriate lock type. */\n\t\trel = table_openrv(stmt->relation, lockmode);\n\n\t\trelid = RelationGetRelid(rel);\n\n\t\tnsitem = addRangeTableEntryForRelation(pstate, rel, lockmode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, false, false);\n\t\trte = nsitem->p_rte;\n\t\trte->requiredPerms = (is_from ? ACL_INSERT : ACL_SELECT);\n\n\t\tif (stmt->whereClause)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\t/* add nsitem to query namespace */\n\t\t\taddNSItemToQuery(pstate, nsitem, false, true, true);\n\n\t\t\t/* Transform the raw expression tree */\n\t\t\twhereClause = transformExpr(pstate, stmt->whereClause, EXPR_KIND_COPY_WHERE);\n\n\t\t\t/* Make sure it yields a boolean result. */\n\t\t\twhereClause = coerce_to_boolean(pstate, whereClause, \"WHERE\");\n\n\t\t\t/* we have to fix its collations too */\n\t\t\tassign_expr_collations(pstate, whereClause);\n\n\t\t\twhereClause = eval_const_expressions(NULL, whereClause);\n\n\t\t\twhereClause = (Node *) canonicalize_qual((Expr *) whereClause, false);\n\t\t\twhereClause = (Node *) make_ands_implicit((Expr *) whereClause);\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttupDesc = RelationGetDescr(rel);\n\t\tattnums = CopyGetAttnums(tupDesc, rel, stmt->attlist);\n\t\tforeach(cur, attnums)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tint\t\t\tattno = lfirst_int(cur) -\n\t\t\tFirstLowInvalidHeapAttributeNumber;\n\n\t\t\tif (is_from)\n\t\t\t\trte->insertedCols = bms_add_member(rte->insertedCols, attno);\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\trte->selectedCols = bms_add_member(rte->selectedCols, attno);\n\t\t}\n\t\tExecCheckRTPerms(pstate->p_rtable, true);\n\n\t\t/*\n\t\t * Permission check for row security policies.\n\t\t *\n\t\t * check_enable_rls will ereport(ERROR) if the user has requested\n\t\t * something invalid and will otherwise indicate if we should enable\n\t\t * RLS (returns RLS_ENABLED) or not for this COPY statement.\n\t\t *\n\t\t * If the relation has a row security policy and we are to apply it\n\t\t * then perform a \"query\" copy and allow the normal query processing\n\t\t * to handle the policies.\n\t\t *\n\t\t * If RLS is not enabled for this, then just fall through to the\n\t\t * normal non-filtering relation handling.\n\t\t */\n\t\tif (check_enable_rls(rte->relid, InvalidOid, false) == RLS_ENABLED)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tSelectStmt *select;\n\t\t\tColumnRef  *cr;\n\t\t\tResTarget  *target;\n\t\t\tRangeVar   *from;\n\t\t\tList\t   *targetList = NIL;\n\n\t\t\tif (is_from)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY FROM not supported with row-level security\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errhint(\"Use INSERT statements instead.\")));\n\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * Build target list\n\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t * If no columns are specified in the attribute list of the COPY\n\t\t\t * command, then the target list is 'all' columns. Therefore, '*'\n\t\t\t * should be used as the target list for the resulting SELECT\n\t\t\t * statement.\n\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t * In the case that columns are specified in the attribute list,\n\t\t\t * create a ColumnRef and ResTarget for each column and add them\n\t\t\t * to the target list for the resulting SELECT statement.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\tif (!stmt->attlist)\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tcr = makeNode(ColumnRef);\n\t\t\t\tcr->fields = list_make1(makeNode(A_Star));\n\t\t\t\tcr->location = -1;\n\n\t\t\t\ttarget = makeNode(ResTarget);\n\t\t\t\ttarget->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\ttarget->indirection = NIL;\n\t\t\t\ttarget->val = (Node *) cr;\n\t\t\t\ttarget->location = -1;\n\n\t\t\t\ttargetList = list_make1(target);\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tListCell   *lc;\n\n\t\t\t\tforeach(lc, stmt->attlist)\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t\t * Build the ColumnRef for each column.  The ColumnRef\n\t\t\t\t\t * 'fields' property is a String 'Value' node (see\n\t\t\t\t\t * nodes/value.h) that corresponds to the column name\n\t\t\t\t\t * respectively.\n\t\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\t\tcr = makeNode(ColumnRef);\n\t\t\t\t\tcr->fields = list_make1(lfirst(lc));\n\t\t\t\t\tcr->location = -1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* Build the ResTarget and add the ColumnRef to it. */\n\t\t\t\t\ttarget = makeNode(ResTarget);\n\t\t\t\t\ttarget->name = NULL;\n\t\t\t\t\ttarget->indirection = NIL;\n\t\t\t\t\ttarget->val = (Node *) cr;\n\t\t\t\t\ttarget->location = -1;\n\n\t\t\t\t\t/* Add each column to the SELECT statement's target list */\n\t\t\t\t\ttargetList = lappend(targetList, target);\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * Build RangeVar for from clause, fully qualified based on the\n\t\t\t * relation which we have opened and locked.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\tfrom = makeRangeVar(get_namespace_name(RelationGetNamespace(rel)),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tpstrdup(RelationGetRelationName(rel)),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t-1);\n\n\t\t\t/* Build query */\n\t\t\tselect = makeNode(SelectStmt);\n\t\t\tselect->targetList = targetList;\n\t\t\tselect->fromClause = list_make1(from);\n\n\t\t\tquery = makeNode(RawStmt);\n\t\t\tquery->stmt = (Node *) select;\n\t\t\tquery->stmt_location = stmt_location;\n\t\t\tquery->stmt_len = stmt_len;\n\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * Close the relation for now, but keep the lock on it to prevent\n\t\t\t * changes between now and when we start the query-based COPY.\n\t\t\t *\n\t\t\t * We'll reopen it later as part of the query-based COPY.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\ttable_close(rel, NoLock);\n\t\t\trel = NULL;\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\telse\n\t{\n\t\tAssert(stmt->query);\n\n\t\tquery = makeNode(RawStmt);\n\t\tquery->stmt = stmt->query;\n\t\tquery->stmt_location = stmt_location;\n\t\tquery->stmt_len = stmt_len;\n\n\t\trelid = InvalidOid;\n\t\trel = NULL;\n\t}\n\n\tif (is_from)\n\t{\n\t\tCopyFromState cstate;\n\n\t\tAssert(rel);\n\n\t\t/* check read-only transaction and parallel mode */\n\t\tif (XactReadOnly && !rel->rd_islocaltemp)\n\t\t\tPreventCommandIfReadOnly(\"COPY FROM\");\n\n\t\tcstate = BeginCopyFrom(pstate, rel, whereClause,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   stmt->filename, stmt->is_program,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t   NULL, stmt->attlist, stmt->options);\n\t\t*processed = CopyFrom(cstate);\t/* copy from file to database */\n\t\tEndCopyFrom(cstate);\n\t}\n\telse\n\t{\n\t\tCopyToState cstate;\n\n\t\tcstate = BeginCopyTo(pstate, rel, query, relid,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t stmt->filename, stmt->is_program,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t stmt->attlist, stmt->options);\n\t\t*processed = DoCopyTo(cstate);\t/* copy from database to file */\n\t\tEndCopyTo(cstate);\n\t}\n\n\tif (rel != NULL)\n\t\ttable_close(rel, NoLock);\n}\n\n/*\n * Extract a CopyHeaderChoice value from a DefElem.  This is like\n * defGetBoolean() but also accepts the special value \"match\".\n */\nstatic CopyHeaderChoice\ndefGetCopyHeaderChoice(DefElem *def, bool is_from)\n{\n\t/*\n\t * If no parameter given, assume \"true\" is meant.\n\t */\n\tif (def->arg == NULL)\n\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n\n\t/*\n\t * Allow 0, 1, \"true\", \"false\", \"on\", \"off\", or \"match\".\n\t */\n\tswitch (nodeTag(def->arg))\n\t{\n\t\tcase T_Integer:\n\t\t\tswitch (intVal(def->arg))\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tcase 0:\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n\t\t\t\tcase 1:\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\t/* otherwise, error out below */\n\t\t\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tchar\t   *sval = defGetString(def);\n\n\t\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t\t * The set of strings accepted here should match up with the\n\t\t\t\t * grammar's opt_boolean_or_string production.\n\t\t\t\t */\n\t\t\t\tif (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"true\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n\t\t\t\tif (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"false\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n\t\t\t\tif (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"on\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n\t\t\t\tif (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"off\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n\t\t\t\tif (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"match\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tif (!is_from)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"cannot use \\\"%s\\\" with HEADER in COPY TO\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsval)));\n\t\t\t\t\treturn COPY_HEADER_MATCH;\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tbreak;\n\t}\n\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t errmsg(\"%s requires a Boolean value or \\\"match\\\"\",\n\t\t\t\t\tdef->defname)));\n\treturn COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\t/* keep compiler quiet */\n}\n\n/*\n * Process the statement option list for COPY.\n *\n * Scan the options list (a list of DefElem) and transpose the information\n * into *opts_out, applying appropriate error checking.\n *\n * If 'opts_out' is not NULL, it is assumed to be filled with zeroes initially.\n *\n * This is exported so that external users of the COPY API can sanity-check\n * a list of options.  In that usage, 'opts_out' can be passed as NULL and\n * the collected data is just leaked until CurrentMemoryContext is reset.\n *\n * Note that additional checking, such as whether column names listed in FORCE\n * QUOTE actually exist, has to be applied later.  This just checks for\n * self-consistency of the options list.\n */\nvoid\nProcessCopyOptions(ParseState *pstate,\n\t\t\t\t   CopyFormatOptions *opts_out,\n\t\t\t\t   bool is_from,\n\t\t\t\t   List *options)\n{\n\tbool\t\tformat_specified = false;\n\tbool\t\tfreeze_specified = false;\n\tbool\t\theader_specified = false;\n\tListCell   *option;\n\n\t/* Support external use for option sanity checking */\n\tif (opts_out == NULL)\n\t\topts_out = (CopyFormatOptions *) palloc0(sizeof(CopyFormatOptions));\n\n\topts_out->file_encoding = -1;\n\n\t/* Extract options from the statement node tree */\n\tforeach(option, options)\n\t{\n\t\tDefElem    *defel = lfirst_node(DefElem, option);\n\n\t\tif (strcmp(defel->defname, \"format\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tchar\t   *fmt = defGetString(defel);\n\n\t\t\tif (format_specified)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\tformat_specified = true;\n\t\t\tif (strcmp(fmt, \"text\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\t /* default format */ ;\n\t\t\telse if (strcmp(fmt, \"csv\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\topts_out->csv_mode = true;\n\t\t\telse if (strcmp(fmt, \"binary\") == 0)\n\t\t\t\topts_out->binary = true;\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY format \\\"%s\\\" not recognized\", fmt),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"freeze\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (freeze_specified)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\tfreeze_specified = true;\n\t\t\topts_out->freeze = defGetBoolean(defel);\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"delimiter\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->delim)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\topts_out->delim = defGetString(defel);\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"null\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->null_print)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\topts_out->null_print = defGetString(defel);\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"header\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (header_specified)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\theader_specified = true;\n\t\t\topts_out->header_line = defGetCopyHeaderChoice(defel, is_from);\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"quote\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->quote)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\topts_out->quote = defGetString(defel);\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"escape\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->escape)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\topts_out->escape = defGetString(defel);\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"force_quote\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->force_quote || opts_out->force_quote_all)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\tif (defel->arg && IsA(defel->arg, A_Star))\n\t\t\t\topts_out->force_quote_all = true;\n\t\t\telse if (defel->arg && IsA(defel->arg, List))\n\t\t\t\topts_out->force_quote = castNode(List, defel->arg);\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"argument to option \\\"%s\\\" must be a list of column names\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdefel->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"force_not_null\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->force_notnull)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\tif (defel->arg && IsA(defel->arg, List))\n\t\t\t\topts_out->force_notnull = castNode(List, defel->arg);\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"argument to option \\\"%s\\\" must be a list of column names\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdefel->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"force_null\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->force_null)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\")));\n\t\t\tif (defel->arg && IsA(defel->arg, List))\n\t\t\t\topts_out->force_null = castNode(List, defel->arg);\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"argument to option \\\"%s\\\" must be a list of column names\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdefel->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"convert_selectively\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\t/*\n\t\t\t * Undocumented, not-accessible-from-SQL option: convert only the\n\t\t\t * named columns to binary form, storing the rest as NULLs. It's\n\t\t\t * allowed for the column list to be NIL.\n\t\t\t */\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->convert_selectively)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\topts_out->convert_selectively = true;\n\t\t\tif (defel->arg == NULL || IsA(defel->arg, List))\n\t\t\t\topts_out->convert_select = castNode(List, defel->arg);\n\t\t\telse\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"argument to option \\\"%s\\\" must be a list of column names\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdefel->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse if (strcmp(defel->defname, \"encoding\") == 0)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->file_encoding >= 0)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"conflicting or redundant options\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t\topts_out->file_encoding = pg_char_to_encoding(defGetString(defel));\n\t\t\tif (opts_out->file_encoding < 0)\n\t\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"argument to option \\\"%s\\\" must be a valid encoding name\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdefel->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t\t}\n\t\telse\n\t\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"option \\\"%s\\\" not recognized\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdefel->defname),\n\t\t\t\t\t parser_errposition(pstate, defel->location)));\n\t}\n\n\t/*\n\t * Check for incompatible options (must do these two before inserting\n\t * defaults)\n\t */\n\tif (opts_out->binary && opts_out->delim)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"cannot specify DELIMITER in BINARY mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->binary && opts_out->null_print)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"cannot specify NULL in BINARY mode\")));\n\n\t/* Set defaults for omitted options */\n\tif (!opts_out->delim)\n\t\topts_out->delim = opts_out->csv_mode ? \",\" : \"\\t\";\n\n\tif (!opts_out->null_print)\n\t\topts_out->null_print = opts_out->csv_mode ? \"\" : \"\\\\N\";\n\topts_out->null_print_len = strlen(opts_out->null_print);\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode)\n\t{\n\t\tif (!opts_out->quote)\n\t\t\topts_out->quote = \"\\\"\";\n\t\tif (!opts_out->escape)\n\t\t\topts_out->escape = opts_out->quote;\n\t}\n\n\t/* Only single-byte delimiter strings are supported. */\n\tif (strlen(opts_out->delim) != 1)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY delimiter must be a single one-byte character\")));\n\n\t/* Disallow end-of-line characters */\n\tif (strchr(opts_out->delim, '\\r') != NULL ||\n\t\tstrchr(opts_out->delim, '\\n') != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY delimiter cannot be newline or carriage return\")));\n\n\tif (strchr(opts_out->null_print, '\\r') != NULL ||\n\t\tstrchr(opts_out->null_print, '\\n') != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY null representation cannot use newline or carriage return\")));\n\n\t/*\n\t * Disallow unsafe delimiter characters in non-CSV mode.  We can't allow\n\t * backslash because it would be ambiguous.  We can't allow the other\n\t * cases because data characters matching the delimiter must be\n\t * backslashed, and certain backslash combinations are interpreted\n\t * non-literally by COPY IN.  Disallowing all lower case ASCII letters is\n\t * more than strictly necessary, but seems best for consistency and\n\t * future-proofing.  Likewise we disallow all digits though only octal\n\t * digits are actually dangerous.\n\t */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode &&\n\t\tstrchr(\"\\\\.abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789\",\n\t\t\t   opts_out->delim[0]) != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY delimiter cannot be \\\"%s\\\"\", opts_out->delim)));\n\n\t/* Check header */\n\tif (opts_out->binary && opts_out->header_line)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"cannot specify HEADER in BINARY mode\")));\n\n\t/* Check quote */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->quote != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY quote available only in CSV mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode && strlen(opts_out->quote) != 1)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY quote must be a single one-byte character\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->delim[0] == opts_out->quote[0])\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY delimiter and quote must be different\")));\n\n\t/* Check escape */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->escape != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY escape available only in CSV mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->csv_mode && strlen(opts_out->escape) != 1)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY escape must be a single one-byte character\")));\n\n\t/* Check force_quote */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && (opts_out->force_quote || only in CSV mode\")));\n\tif (opts_out->force_notnull != NIL && !is_from)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force not null only available using COPY FROM\")));\n\n\t/* Check force_null */\n\tif (!opts_out->csv_mode && opts_out->force_null != NIL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force null available only in CSV mode\")));\n\n\tif (opts_out->force_null != NIL && !is_from)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"COPY force null only available using COPY FROM\")));\n\n\t/* Don't allow the delimiter to appear in the null string. */\n\tif (strchr(opts_out->null_print, opts_out->delim[0]) != NULL)\n\t\tereport(ERROR,\n\t\t\t\t(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n\t\t\t\t errmsg(\"CSV quote character must not appear in the NULL specification\")));\n}\n\n/*\n * CopyGetAttnums - build an integer list of attnums to be copied\n *\n * The input attnamelist is either the user-specified column list,\n * or NIL if there was none (in which case we want all the non-dropped\n * columns).\n *\n * We don't include generated columns in the generated full list and we don't\n * allow them to be specified explicitly.  They don't make sense for COPY\n * FROM, but we could possibly allow them for COPY TO.  But this way it's at\n * least ensured that whatever we copy out can be copied back in.\n *\n * rel can be NULL ... it's only used for error reports.\n */\nList *\nCopyGetAttnums(TupleDesc tupDesc, Relation rel, List *attnamelist)\n{\n\tList\t   *attnums = NIL;\n\n\tif (attnamelist == NIL)\n\t{\n\t\t/* Generate default column list */\n\t\tint\t\t\tattr_count = tupDesc->natts;\n\t\tint\t\t\ti;\n\n\t\tfor (i = 0; i < attr_count; i++)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tif (TupleDescAttr(tupDesc, i)->attisdropped)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\tif (TupleDescAttr(tupDesc, i)->attgenerated)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue;\n\t\t\tattnums = lappend_int(attnums, i + 1);\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\telse\n\t{\n\t\t/* Validate the user-supplied list and extract attnums */\n\t\tListCell   *l;\n\n\t\tforeach(l, attnamelist)\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tchar\t   *name = strVal(lfirst(l));\n\t\t\tint\t\t\tattnum;\n\t\t\tint\t\t\ti;\n\n\t\t\t/* Lookup column name */\n\t\t\tattnum = InvalidAttrNumber;\n\t\t\tfor (i = 0; The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.\n\nSummary:\n1. Primary Request and Intent:\n   The task is to implement `COPY FROM CSV WITH HEADER MATCH` for PostgreSQL. This feature validates the CSV file's header row column names match the target table's column names (in order and spelling). Currently `COPY ... WITH (HEADER)` simply skips the first row; `HEADER MATCH` should verify it matches.\n\n   Requirements:\n   - Extend COPY grammar (`src/backend/parser/gram.y`): Add MATCH as a valid keyword after HEADER in COPY options\n   - Update COPY option processing (`src/backend/commands/copy.c`): Parse HEADER MATCH option, set a flag using CopyHeaderChoice enum (OFF, ON, MATCH)\n   - Implement header validation in `src/backend/commands/copyfromparse.c`: Compare CSV header columns to target table column names (case-insensitive)\n   - Add regression tests in `src/test/regress/sql/copy.sql` with both matching/mismatching test cases\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n   - PostgreSQL COPY command implementation (copy.c, copyfromparse.c)\n   - `CopyHeaderChoice` enum: `COPY_HEADER_FALSE=0`, `COPY_HEADER_TRUE`, `COPY_HEADER_MATCH`\n   - `CopyFormatOptions` struct: holds COPY options including `header_line` field\n   - `defGetCopyHeaderChoice()` function: extracts CopyHeaderChoice from DefElem, accepts \"true\"/\"false\"/\"on\"/\"off\"/\"match\"\n   - `NextCopyFromRawFields()` function in copyfromparse.c: reads raw fields with header validation\n   - `namestrcmp()` for case-insensitive column name comparison (from `utils/builtins.h`)\n   - PostgreSQL grammar using `copy_generic_opt_list` (new-style parenthesized options) for `(header match)` syntax\n   - MATCH is already an UNRESERVED_KEYWORD in kwlist.h, accessible via `opt_boolean_or_string → NonReservedWord_or_Sconst`\n   - Sourcegraph MCP tools for remote code exploration on `github.com/sg-evals/postgres--5a461dc4`\n   - Feature was introduced in PostgreSQL REL_15_0; REL_14_0 and earlier use `bool header_line`\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n\n   - **`/workspace/src/include/commands/copy.h`** (REL_18_2 version)\n     - Added `CopyHeaderChoice` enum before `CopyFormatOptions`\n     - Changed `bool header_line` to `CopyHeaderChoice header_line` in `CopyFormatOptions`\n     - Also includes REL_18_2 additions: `CopyOnErrorChoice`, `CopyLogVerbosityChoice` enums\n     ```c\n     typedef enum CopyHeaderChoice\n     {\n         COPY_HEADER_FALSE = 0,\n         COPY_HEADER_TRUE,\n         COPY_HEADER_MATCH,\n     } CopyHeaderChoice;\n     \n     typedef struct CopyFormatOptions\n     {\n         ...\n         CopyHeaderChoice header_line;   /* header line? */\n         ...\n     } CopyFormatOptions;\n     ```\n\n   - **`/workspace/src/backend/commands/copy.c`** (REL_18_2 version)\n     - Key addition: `defGetCopyHeaderChoice()` function that parses the \"match\" string value\n     - Changed `opts_out->header_line = defGetBoolean(defel)` to `opts_out->header_line = defGetCopyHeaderChoice(defel, is_from)`\n     - Changed header check from `!csv_mode && header_line` (CSV-only) to `binary && header_line` (BINARY-incompatible but TEXT allowed)\n     ```c\n     static CopyHeaderChoice\n     defGetCopyHeaderChoice(DefElem *def, bool is_from)\n     {\n         if (def->arg == NULL)\n             return COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n         switch (nodeTag(def->arg))\n         {\n             case T_Integer:\n                 switch (intVal(def->arg))\n                 {\n                     case 0: return COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n                     case 1: return COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n                 }\n                 break;\n             default:\n                 {\n                     char *sval = defGetString(def);\n                     if (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"true\") == 0)  return COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n                     if (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"false\") == 0) return COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n                     if (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"on\") == 0)    return COPY_HEADER_TRUE;\n                     if (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"off\") == 0)   return COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n                     if (pg_strcasecmp(sval, \"match\") == 0)\n                     {\n                         if (!is_from)\n                             ereport(ERROR, (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),\n                                 errmsg(\"cannot use \\\"%s\\\" with HEADER in COPY TO\", sval)));\n                         return COPY_HEADER_MATCH;\n                     }\n                 }\n                 break;\n         }\n         ereport(ERROR, (errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),\n             errmsg(\"%s requires a Boolean value or \\\"match\\\"\", def->defname)));\n         return COPY_HEADER_FALSE;\n     }\n     ```\n\n   - **`/workspace/src/backend/commands/copyfromparse.c`** (REL_18_2 version)\n     - Added `#include \"utils/builtins.h\"` for `namestrcmp()`\n     - Modified `NextCopyFromRawFields()` to validate COPY_HEADER_MATCH\n     - Key implementation in lines 762-833:\n     ```c\n     /* on input check that the header line is correct if needed */\n     if (cstate->cur_lineno == 0 && cstate->opts.header_line)\n     {\n         ListCell   *cur;\n         TupleDesc   tupDesc;\n         tupDesc = RelationGetDescr(cstate->rel);\n         cstate->cur_lineno++;\n         done = CopyReadLine(cstate, is_csv);\n         if (cstate->opts.header_line == COPY_HEADER_MATCH)\n         {\n             int fldnum;\n             if (is_csv)\n                 fldct = CopyReadAttributesCSV(cstate);\n             else\n                 fldct = CopyReadAttributesText(cstate);\n             if (fldct != list_length(cstate->attnumlist))\n                 ereport(ERROR, (errcode(ERRCODE_BAD_COPY_FILE_FORMAT),\n                     errmsg(\"wrong number of fields in header line: got %d, expected %d\",\n                         fldct, list_length(cstate->attnumlist))));\n             fldnum = 0;\n             foreach(cur, cstate->attnumlist)\n             {\n                 int attnum = lfirst_int(cur);\n                 char *colName;\n                 Form_pg_attribute attr = TupleDescAttr(tupDesc, attnum - 1);\n                 Assert(fldnum < cstate->max_fields);\n                 colName = cstate->raw_fields[fldnum++];\n                 if (colName == NULL)\n                     ereport(ERROR, (errcode(ERRCODE_BAD_COPY_FILE_FORMAT),\n                         errmsg(\"column name mismatch in header line field %d: got null value (\\\"%s\\\"), expected \\\"%s\\\"\",\n                             fldnum, cstate->opts.null_print, NameStr(attr->attname))));\n                 if (namestrcmp(&attr->attname, colName) != 0)\n                     ereport(ERROR, (errcode(ERRCODE_BAD_COPY_FILE_FORMAT),\n                         errmsg(\"column name mismatch in header line field %d: got \\\"%s\\\", expected \\\"%s\\\"\",\n                             fldnum, colName, NameStr(attr->attname))));\n             }\n         }\n         if (done)\n             return false;\n     }\n     ```\n\n   -
